parameters.command:
sh -c 'set -u
REPO="${REPO_PATH:-}"
printf "# Repo Context
"
printf "generated_at: %s
" "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
if [ -z "$REPO" ]; then printf "
## Preflight
FAIL: REPO_PATH not set.
"; exit 0; fi
cd "$REPO" || { printf "FAIL: repo not found
"; exit 0; }
printf "branch: "; git branch --show-current || true
printf "
## Git Status
"; git status --short --branch || true
printf "
## Recent Work, Last 5 Minutes
"
git log --since="5 minutes ago" --pretty=format:"%h %ad %s" --date=iso || true
printf "

## Recent Work, Today
"
git log --since="midnight" --pretty=format:"%h %ad %s" --date=iso || true
printf "

## Diff Stat
"; git diff --stat || true
printf "
## Lightweight Security Scan
"
SECURITY_HITS="$(git ls-files | xargs grep -nE "(API_KEY=sk-|OPENAI_API_KEY=|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=|AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
if [ -z "$SECURITY_HITS" ]; then echo "PASS: no secret patterns found"; else printf "%s
" "$SECURITY_HITS" | sed -E "s/(=)[^[:space:]]+/=REDACTED/g" | head -n 20; fi'

parameters.jsCode:
const context = ($input.first().json.stdout || '').slice(-8000);
const now = new Date().toISOString();
const model = $env.OLLAMA_CHAT_MODEL || 'nemotron-3-nano:latest';
const system = 'You are a local autonomous review agent for qwen-agent-collective.

Review the repo context and produce a concise report. Do not claim to have changed files.

Return Markdown with exactly these sections:
# Local Worker Report
## Verdict
PASS, WARN, or FAIL with one sentence.
## What Changed Recently
Bullets grounded only in the context.
## Repo Health
Tests/config/docs/security observations.
## Recommended Next Work Slice
One small task that an autonomous worker can safely attempt next.
## Risks Or Blockers
Concrete blockers or uncertain facts.';
const user = 'Time: ' + now + '

Repo context:

' + (context || 'No repo context captured.');
return [{ json: { model, now, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: system }, { role: 'user', content: user }] } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $json.model, messages: $json.messages, temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 800, stream: false } }}

parameters.command:
=sh -c 'set -eu
REPO="${REPO_PATH:-}"
if [ -z "$REPO" ]; then echo "REPO_PATH is not set" >&2; exit 1; fi
cd "$REPO"
mkdir -p "$(dirname "{{$json.report_path}}")"
printf %s "{{$json.report_base64}}" | base64 -d > "{{$json.report_path}}"
printf "Wrote %s\n" "{{$json.report_path}}"
'

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: true, report_path: $node['Normalize Report'].json.report_path, verdict: $node['Normalize Report'].json.verdict, coding_agent: $input.first().json || {} } }];
